---
title: "Case Study — 2x Faster Agent Onboarding"
date: 2025-09-16T22:06:00.000Z
summary: "Policy-aware assistants and runbooks halved time-to-productivity for new hires."
---

A growth-stage company deployed an agent assist with governed tool access and evidence-first workflows.

Outcomes in 30 days:

- 52% reduction in time-to-first-productive-task
- 18% fewer handoffs due to embedded runbooks and contextual links
- 0 Sev-1 incidents; guardrails prevented risky actions during training

Implementation highlights:

- Task templates with preflight checklists and safe tool adapters
- Canary rollouts with rollback on violation spikes
- Daily evidence review: traces, artifacts, and policy events

This accelerated onboarding while increasing safety and confidence.
